name: io.github.navapbc/rebar
description: Event-sourced ticket system with a Jira reconciler, exposed as an MCP server.

environmentVariables.name: REBAR_ROOT
environmentVariables.description: Path to the repo root that holds the .tickets-tracker store (defaults to the git toplevel of the working dir).

environmentVariables.name: REBAR_MCP_READONLY
environmentVariables.description: Set to 1 to expose only the read tools (no write/mutation tools).

environmentVariables.name: REBAR_MCP_ALLOW_LLM
environmentVariables.description: Set to 1 to enable the billable LLM tools (review_ticket / review_code / scan_spec / verify_completion / review_plan); off by default.

environmentVariables.name: REBAR_MCP_ALLOW_JIRA_SYNC
environmentVariables.description: Set to 1 to allow the live (mutating) Jira reconcile mode; otherwise reconcile is dry-run only.

environmentVariables.name: REBAR_MCP_TRANSPORT
environmentVariables.description: Transport for the MCP server: 'stdio' (default) or 'http' (the optional Streamable-HTTP transport).

environmentVariables.name: REBAR_MCP_HTTP_HOST
environmentVariables.description: Bind host for the Streamable-HTTP transport (default 127.0.0.1).

environmentVariables.name: REBAR_MCP_HTTP_PORT
environmentVariables.description: Bind port for the Streamable-HTTP transport (1-65535; default 8000).

environmentVariables.name: REBAR_MCP_HTTP_PATH
environmentVariables.description: URL path the Streamable-HTTP transport serves on (default /mcp).

environmentVariables.name: REBAR_MCP_HTTP_ALLOWED_HOSTS
environmentVariables.description: Comma-separated allowlist of exact host:port values accepted by the Streamable-HTTP DNS-rebinding protection; empty defaults to loopback.

environmentVariables.name: REBAR_MCP_HTTP_ALLOWED_ORIGINS
environmentVariables.description: Comma-separated allowlist of exact Origin values accepted by the Streamable-HTTP DNS-rebinding protection; empty defaults to loopback.

environmentVariables.name: REBAR_MCP_HTTP_TLS_AT_EDGE
environmentVariables.description: Set to 1 to acknowledge TLS is terminated at the edge; required to bind the Streamable-HTTP transport to a non-loopback host.

environmentVariables.name: REBAR_MCP_ALLOW_UNAUTHENTICATED_HTTP
environmentVariables.description: Set to 1 to acknowledge running the Streamable-HTTP transport without a token verifier; required to boot the HTTP transport while auth is off.
